page: Microsoft Azure E128s_v7 is an Esv7-family virtual machine built on the x86_64 architecture and powered by Intel processors. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance features 128 dedicated vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU.

This server configuration does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via external network-attached storage, though the instance is designated as Premium Storage capable. Additionally, the configuration lacks integrated graphics processing units and does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses, requiring users to provision these resources separately if needed.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory density of 8.0 GB per core positions this instance for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent compute performance without resource contention. This profile is designed for large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and heavy data-processing pipelines that require substantial memory capacity without the need for local physical disks or hardware acceleration.
description: Microsoft Azure E128s_v7 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine from the Esv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high-density memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage, though it is Premium Storage capable, requiring external volumes for data persistence. It also lacks integrated GPUs and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. This resource allocation makes the E128s_v7 highly suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads, such as large relational databases, in-memory data analytics, and complex enterprise resource planning systems that demand substantial memory capacity and dedicated compute resources without requiring local physical storage or hardware acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128s_v7 is an Esv7-family virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1024.0 GB of RAM, and Premium Storage capability on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring one hundred and twenty-eight dedicated cores and one terabyte of system RAM for enterprise workloads.

1024.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
Premium Storage capable with no local storage bundled

Engineered for large-scale databases and in-memory analytics
